get.description: List BedrockDataSource resources by subscription ID
List BedrockDataSource resources by resource group

put.description: Create a BedrockDataSource. Please note that end user resource creation is currently restricted, but it will be enabled in the future.

Azure-AsyncOperation.description: A link to the status monitor

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

parameters.name: properties
parameters.description: The resource properties to be updated.

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

createdAt.description: The time at which the data source was created.

dataDeletionPolicy.description: The deletion policy for the data source.

dataSourceConfiguration.description: Specifies a raw data source location to ingest.

dataSourceStatus.description: The status of a data source.

failureReasons.description: The details of the failure reasons related to the data source.

knowledgeBaseId.description: The unique identifier of the knowledge base to which to add the data source.

name.description: The name of the data source.

serverSideEncryptionConfiguration.description: Contains details about the server-side encryption for the data source.

updatedAt.description: The time at which the knowledge base was last updated.

vectorIngestionConfiguration.description: Details about how to chunk the documents in the data source. A chunk refers to an excerpt from a data source that is returned when the knowledge base that it belongs to is queried.

parsingModality.description: Determine how will parsed content be stored.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

BedrockDataSourceListResult.description: The response of a BedrockDataSource list operation.

value.description: The BedrockDataSource items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

provisioningState.description: The status of the last operation.

BedrockDataSourceTagsUpdate.description: The type used for updating tags in BedrockDataSource resources.

parsingModality.description: Determine how will parsed content be stored.

parsingPrompt.description: Instructions for interpreting the contents of a document.

enrichmentStrategyConfiguration.description: Strategy to be used when using Bedrock Foundation Model for Context Enrichment.

chunkingStrategy.description: Knowledge base can split your source data into chunks. A chunk refers to an excerpt from a data source that is returned when the knowledge base that it belongs to is queried. You have the following options for chunking your data. If you opt for NONE, then you may want to pre-process your files by splitting them up such that each file corresponds to a chunk.

fixedSizeChunkingConfiguration.description: Configurations for when you choose fixed-size chunking. If you set the chunkingStrategy as NONE, exclude this field.

hierarchicalChunkingConfiguration.description: Configurations for when you choose hierarchical chunking. If you set the chunkingStrategy as NONE, exclude this field.

semanticChunkingConfiguration.description: Configurations for when you choose semantic chunking. If you set the chunkingStrategy as NONE, exclude this field.

filterConfiguration.description: The type of filtering that you want to apply to certain objects or content of the data source. For example, the PATTERN type is regular expression patterns you can apply to filter your content.

crawlerConfiguration.description: The configuration of the Confluence content. For example, configuring specific types of Confluence content.

sourceConfiguration.description: The endpoint information to connect to your Confluence data source.

authType.description: The supported authentication type to authenticate and connect to your Confluence instance.

credentialsSecretArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name of an AWS Secrets Manager secret that stores your authentication credentials for your Confluence instance URL. For more information on the key-value pairs that must be included in your secret, depending on your authentication type, see Confluence connection configuration.

hostType.description: The supported host type, whether online/cloud or server/on-premises.

hostUrl.description: The Confluence host URL or instance URL.

bedrockFoundationModelConfiguration.description: Bedrock Foundation Model configuration to be used for Context Enrichment.

type.description: Enrichment type to be used for the vector database.

patternObjectFilter.description: The configuration of specific filters applied to your data source content. You can filter out or include certain content.

intermediateStorage.description: A location for storing content from data sources temporarily as it is processed by custom components in the ingestion pipeline.

transformations.description: A list of Lambda functions that process documents.

confluenceConfiguration.description: The configuration information to connect to Confluence as your data source.

s3Configuration.description: The configuration information to connect to Amazon S3 as your data source.

salesforceConfiguration.description: The configuration information to connect to Salesforce as your data source.

sharePointConfiguration.description: The configuration information to connect to SharePoint as your data source.

type.description: The type of the data source location.

webConfiguration.description: Configures a web data source location.

maxTokens.description: The maximum number of tokens to include in a chunk.

overlapPercentage.description: The percentage of overlap between adjacent chunks of a data source.

overlapTokens.description: The number of tokens to repeat across chunks in the same layer.

maxTokens.description: The maximum number of tokens that a chunk can contain in this layer.

bedrockDataAutomationConfiguration.description: Settings for a Bedrock Data Automation used to parse documents for a data source.

bedrockFoundationModelConfiguration.description: Settings for a foundation model used to parse documents for a data source.

parsingStrategy.description: The parsing strategy for the data source.

parsingPromptText.description: Instructions for interpreting the contents of a document.

exclusionFilters.description: A set of regular expression filter patterns for a type of object.

inclusionFilters.description: A set of regular expression filter patterns for a type of object.

objectType.description: The supported object type or content type of the data source.

ProvisioningState.description: The provisioning state of a resource.

values.name: Accepted
values.description: The resource create request has been accepted

bucketArn.description: The ARN of the bucket that contains the data source.

bucketOwnerAccountId.description: The account ID for the owner of the S3 bucket.

inclusionPrefixes.description: A list of S3 prefixes that define the object containing the data sources.

filterConfiguration.description: The type of filtering that you want to apply to certain objects or content of the data source. For example, the PATTERN type is regular expression patterns you can apply to filter your content.

crawlerConfiguration.description: The configuration of filtering the Salesforce content. For example, configuring regular expression patterns to include or exclude certain content.

sourceConfiguration.description: The endpoint information to connect to your Salesforce data source.

authType.description: The supported authentication type to authenticate and connect to your Salesforce instance.

credentialsSecretArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name of an AWS Secrets Manager secret that stores your authentication credentials for your Salesforce instance URL. For more information on the key-value pairs that must be included in your secret, depending on your authentication type, see Salesforce connection configuration.

hostUrl.description: The Salesforce host URL or instance URL.

breakpointPercentileThreshold.description: The dissimilarity threshold for splitting chunks.

maxTokens.description: The maximum number of tokens that a chunk can contain.

kmsKeyArn.description: The ARN of the AWS KMS key used to encrypt the resource.

filterConfiguration.description: The type of filtering that you want to apply to certain objects or content of the data source. For example, the PATTERN type is regular expression patterns you can apply to filter your content.

crawlerConfiguration.description: The configuration of the SharePoint content. For example, configuring specific types of SharePoint content.

sourceConfiguration.description: The endpoint information to connect to your SharePoint data source.

authType.description: The supported authentication type to authenticate and connect to your SharePoint site/sites.

credentialsSecretArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name of an AWS Secrets Manager secret that stores your authentication credentials for your SharePoint site/sites. For more information on the key-value pairs that must be included in your secret, depending on your authentication type, see SharePoint connection configuration.

domain.description: The domain of your SharePoint instance or site URL/URLs.

hostType.description: The supported host type, whether online/cloud or server/on-premises.

siteUrls.description: A list of one or more SharePoint site URLs.

tenantId.description: The identifier of your Microsoft 365 tenant.

stepToApply.description: When the service applies the transformation.

transformationFunction.description: A Lambda function that processes documents.

transformationLambdaConfiguration.description: A Lambda function that processes documents.

chunkingConfiguration.description: Details about how to chunk the documents in the data source. A chunk refers to an excerpt from a data source that is returned when the knowledge base that it belongs to is queried.

contextEnrichmentConfiguration.description: Additional Enrichment Configuration for example when using GraphRag.

customTransformationConfiguration.description: Settings for customizing steps in the data source content ingestion pipeline.

crawlerLimits.description: Limit settings for the web crawler.

exclusionFilters.description: A set of regular expression filter patterns for a type of object.

inclusionFilters.description: A set of regular expression filter patterns for a type of object.

scope.description: The scope that a web crawl job will be restricted to.

userAgent.description: The suffix that will be included in the user agent header.

userAgentHeader.description: The full user agent header, including UUID and suffix.

maxPages.description: Maximum number of pages the crawler can crawl.

rateLimit.description: Rate of web URLs retrieved per minute.
